response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has 16+ years of software engineering experience with a strong focus on full-stack development and infrastructure, meeting the minimum 15-year requirement. While his resume highlights deep expertise in cloud technologies, distributed systems, and software craftsmanship, it lacks explicit AI/ML experience or products/platforms built with AI, which is a preferred qualification. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and leadership in open-source projects demonstrate innovation and autonomy. His technical breadth and leadership in engineering teams align well with the role's strategic and collaborative demands.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (cloud, embedded, mobile, web) with a strong focus on full-stack and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, showing innovation, leadership, and product development skills
Demonstrated ability to work across tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java, C++) and deep expertise in CI/CD, TDD, and software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML experience or demonstrated products/platforms built with AI, which is a key preferred qualification
No clear evidence of cloud or AI expertise at a strategic or platform level in a large-scale enterprise context
Most recent roles focus heavily on software development rather than AI strategy or cloud platform innovation

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise and strategic product development
